description_long: This object is a large, rectangular wooden storage locker with a pitched roof covered in multicolored, weathered shingles. The front features a pair of wide, vertically-planked wooden doors, each reinforced with horizontal metal bands and a central key lock. The side and rear panels are made of dark, charred-looking wood, giving the structure a rustic, aged appearance. The roof is composed of overlapping tiles in shades of green, brown, and red, suggesting durability against outdoor elements. There are no visible windows or ventilation openings, and the structure sits directly on the ground with minimal clearance. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for storing tools, equipment, or other items in an outdoor urban or residential setting.
description: A large, weathered wooden storage locker with a pitched, multicolored shingle roof and double front doors secured by a key lock. The sides and back are made of dark, charred wood, giving it a rustic, outdoor-ready appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing double wooden doors with metal bands and a central key lock under a pitched shingle roof.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the long, charred wooden panel with no doors or windows, and the full length of the shingle roof.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a solid, charred wooden panel beneath the pitched roof, with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a long, charred wooden panel and the shingle roof.
